name: Automated invoice processing with AI OCR and Google Sheets
description: Processes invoice documents by scraping content with Firecrawl or accepting text input, uses Claude AI to extract structured invoice data (vendor, amounts, line items), logs everything to Google Sheets, and sends a confirmation summary to Slack.

source.originalName: Automated invoice processing with Telegram, GPT-4o, OCR and SAP integration

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for invoice URL scraping

googleSheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for invoice logging

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for processing notifications

invoiceUrl.description: URL of the invoice document to process

invoiceText.description: Raw invoice text if not using URL (paste invoice content)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for invoice processing notifications

spreadsheetName.description: Name for the Google Sheets spreadsheet

steps.name: Get invoice content via Firecrawl or direct text
Scrape invoice URL with Firecrawl (if URL provided)
Prepare invoice content for AI analysis
Build Claude prompt for invoice data extraction
Extract invoice data with Claude AI
Build spreadsheet rows for invoice data
Save invoice data to Google Sheets
